BAGEP 2025 Award to 4 Academicians from our University

Our university continues to make a name for itself with its scientific achievements. According to the results of BAGEP 2025, four of our academicians received one of the most prestigious awards given to young scientists.

The results of the Science Academy Young Scientists Award Program (BAGEP) 2025, which is carried out by the Science Academy to encourage young academics, have been announced. This year, four valuable academicians from our university were deemed worthy of this prestigious award.

Within the scope of BAGEP, which has been carried out since 2013 to support young scientists and encourage qualified research, 475 awards have been given so far. In 2025, 38 new names were added to this list. The awards will be presented to their owners at a ceremony to be held at Özyeğin University on Saturday, April 26.

Our academicians who won the BAGEP Award this year: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Aslı Aktan Erciyes, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Aslı Aktan Erciyes, Dr. Alara Efsun Yazıcıoğlu, Dr. Lecturer. Prof. Dr. Burak Başaranlar and Dr. Lecturer Yener Koç. Prof. Dr. Yener Koç.

We congratulate our award-winning academics and wish them continued success.
